cmake_minimum_required(
    VERSION 4.2.0
    FATAL_ERROR
)

project(external-libassert
    VERSION 2.2.1
    DESCRIPTION "The most over-engineered C++ assertion library"
    HOMEPAGE_URL "https://github.com/jeremy-rifkin/libassert.git"
)
include(ExternalProject)

set(LIBASSERT_DISABLE_CXX_20_MODULES OFF)
if(NOT CMAKE_CXX_SCAN_FOR_MODULES)
    set(LIBASSERT_DISABLE_CXX_20_MODULES ON)
endif()

list(APPEND CMAKE_ARGS
    "-DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}"
    "-DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE:PATH=${CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE}"
    "-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}"
    "-DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=${CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD}"
    "-DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED=${CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED}"
    "-DCMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS=${CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS}"
    "-DCMAKE_CXX_SCAN_FOR_MODULES=${CMAKE_CXX_SCAN_FOR_MODULES}"
    "-DCMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION=${CMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION}"
    "-DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS}"
    "-DLIBASSERT_USE_EXTERNAL_CPPTRACE=TRUE"
    "-DLIBASSERT_BUILD_SHARED=FALSE"
    "-DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF"
    "-DLIBASSERT_DISABLE_CXX_20_MODULES=${LIBASSERT_DISABLE_CXX_20_MODULES}"
)

message(STATUS "Preparing external project \"libassert\" with args:")
foreach(CMAKE_ARG ${CMAKE_ARGS})
    message(STATUS "-- ${CMAKE_ARG}")
endforeach()

ExternalProject_add(
    libassert
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/jeremy-rifkin/libassert.git
    GIT_TAG v2.2.1
    PREFIX libassert
    CMAKE_ARGS "${CMAKE_ARGS}"
    GIT_SHALLOW TRUE
    DEPENDS cpptrace
)
